queries.name: 🎬 Films in a specific festival
queries.query:
SELECT f.*
FROM film AS f
JOIN festival_film AS ff ON ff.film_id = f.id
WHERE ff.festival_id = ?

queries.name: 📊 Number of films per category
queries.query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, COUNT(f.id) AS 'film_count'
FROM category AS c
LEFT JOIN film AS f ON c.id = f.category_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name

queries.name: 👨‍💼 Directors of a film
queries.query:
SELECT d.name AS 'director'
FROM director AS d
JOIN film_director AS fd ON fd.director_id = d.id
WHERE fd.film_id = ?

queries.name: 🎭 Actors of a film
queries.query:
SELECT a.name AS 'actor'
FROM actor AS a
JOIN film_actor AS fa ON a.id = fa.actor_id
WHERE fa.film_id = ?

queries.name: 📅 Future screenings of a film
queries.query:
SELECT f.title, sc.time, sc.date, sc.room, sc.capacity, s.name
FROM film AS f
JOIN screening AS sc ON f.id = sc.film_id
JOIN staff AS s ON s.id = sc.coordinator_id
WHERE f.id = ?
AND datetime(sc.date || ' ' || sc.time) > datetime('now')
ORDER BY sc.date, sc.time

queries.name: 🎥 Number of screenings per film
queries.query:
SELECT f.id, f.title, COUNT(sc.id) AS 'screening_count'
FROM film AS f
LEFT JOIN screening AS sc ON sc.film_id = f.id
GROUP BY f.id, f.title
ORDER BY screening_count DESC, f.title

queries.name: ⭐ Average score for each film
queries.query:
SELECT f.id, f.title, ROUND(AVG(e.score), 2) AS 'average_score'
FROM film AS f
JOIN evaluation AS e ON e.film_id = f.id
GROUP BY f.id, f.title

queries.name: 🏆 Films ranked by average score
queries.query:
SELECT f.id, f.title, ROUND(AVG(e.score), 2) AS 'average_score'
FROM film AS f
JOIN evaluation AS e ON e.film_id = f.id
GROUP BY f.id, f.title
ORDER BY average_score DESC, f.title

queries.name: ❌ Films without evaluations
queries.query:
SELECT f.id, f.title
FROM film AS f
LEFT JOIN evaluation AS e ON e.film_id = f.id
WHERE e.film_id IS NULL

queries.name: 👨‍⚖️ Judges evaluating over five films
queries.query:
SELECT j.id, j.name, j.specialization, COUNT(e.film_id) AS 'films_evaluated'
FROM judge AS j
JOIN evaluation AS e ON j.id = e.judge_id
GROUP BY j.id, j.name, j.specialization
HAVING COUNT(e.film_id) > 5
ORDER BY films_evaluated DESC

queries.name: 👥 Films with multiple directors
queries.query:
SELECT f.id, f.title, COUNT(fd.director_id) AS 'director_count'
FROM film AS f
JOIN film_director AS fd ON f.id = fd.film_id
GROUP BY f.id, f.title
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT fd.director_id) > 1

queries.name: 🌟 Actors in more than two films
queries.query:
SELECT a.id, a.name, COUNT(fa.actor_id) AS 'film_count'
FROM actor AS a
JOIN film_actor AS fa ON a.id = fa.actor_id
GROUP BY a.id, a.name
HAVING COUNT(fa.actor_id) > 2

queries.name: 📆 Screenings on specific date
queries.query:
SELECT f.title, sc.time, sc.room, sc.capacity, s.name
FROM film AS f
JOIN screening AS sc ON f.id = sc.film_id
JOIN staff AS s ON s.id = sc.coordinator_id
WHERE sc.date = ?
ORDER BY sc.time

queries.name: 🏢 Screenings per room by date
queries.query:
SELECT sc.room, COUNT(*) AS 'screening_count'
FROM screening AS sc
WHERE sc.date = ?
GROUP BY sc.room

queries.name: ⚖️ Judges without evaluations
queries.query:
SELECT j.id, j.name, j.specialization
FROM judge AS j
LEFT JOIN evaluation AS e ON j.id = e.judge_id
WHERE e.judge_id IS NULL
ORDER BY j.name

queries.name: 🎞️ Films without screenings
queries.query:
SELECT f.id, f.title
FROM film AS f
LEFT JOIN screening AS sc ON sc.film_id = f.id
WHERE sc.film_id IS NULL
